global.description: The ad features a prominent brand name at the top and a call to action at the bottom, with decorative shapes in the center.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with a special offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: A large, bold text at the bottom stating 'Your next favorite pick €19, 9 Get offer' in a clear font.
